child_sections.title: vision extraction (lmstudio_qwen)
child_sections.summary: This document section (Appendix 1.4) details the budget allocation and expenditure for fiscal year 2013 (Ethiopian calendar, likely 2020/2021 Gregorian) across two programs: Program 1 – Work Leadership & Administration, and an Investment Policy Study & Research program. It presents both allocated budgets versus actual spending in thousands of Birr, alongside planned targets and achievements for the same period, specifically focusing on creating a favorable investment climate through studies, forums, and policy improvements (measured by number of studies/forums held and improvement scores).
